targets.rawSql: SELECT site, SUM(total_energy_j) AS energy_j FROM energy_jobs WHERE is_valid=TRUE AND date > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY site ORDER BY energy_j DESC
SELECT day AS time, site, total_j FROM v_daily_energy_by_site WHERE day > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY time
SELECT arch, SUM(total_energy_j) AS energy_j FROM energy_jobs WHERE is_valid=TRUE GROUP BY arch
SELECT measurement_src, COUNT(*) AS jobs FROM energy_jobs WHERE is_valid=TRUE GROUP BY measurement_src
SELECT measurement_src, AVG(total_energy_j) AS avg_j FROM energy_jobs WHERE is_valid=TRUE AND measurement_src != 'unknown' GROUP BY measurement_src
SELECT job_name, repo_name, site, category, ROUND(total_j::numeric,2) AS total_j, ROUND(avg_j::numeric,2) AS avg_j, runs FROM v_top_jobs_energy LIMIT 10

SELECT SUM(rows_ingested) AS ingested, SUM(rows_rejected) AS rejected, ROUND(100.0*SUM(rows_ingested)/NULLIF(SUM(rows_ingested)+SUM(rows_rejected),0),1) AS success_pct FROM ingestion_log WHERE run_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT hour AS time, ingested, rejected FROM v_ingestion_health WHERE hour > NOW()-INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY hour
SELECT day AS time, component, SUM(total_j) AS energy_j FROM v_component_energy WHERE day > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day, component ORDER BY day
SELECT month, category, SUM(total_j) AS energy_j FROM v_monthly_job_energy GROUP BY month, category ORDER BY month
